positive: An ornate, whimsical woodland creature silhouette, resembling a glowing deer or stag, adorned with bioluminescent flora and delicate crystalline antlers. The creature is centered and gracefully positioned against a deep twilight forest backdrop. The style is a perfect blend of Art Nouveau and high-contrast gothic fantasy, utilizing strong, clean black linework and accented by vibrant, glowing teal, sapphire blue, and emerald green luminescence. The composition must be isolated and symmetrical, optimized for a central t-shirt print. Ideal lighting is dramatic backlight, creating a halo effect around the subject. The overall aesthetic should be highly detailed, elegant, and mystical. Vector illustration quality, high DPI, clean print lines.
